title: Important Announcement from Doğuş University Rectorate!
content:
Announcements

Details

Date: 10 February 2023

Important Announcement from Doğuş University Rectorate!

Dear Members of Doğuş University,

As per the announcement of the Council of Higher Education, due to the earthquake that hit Kahramanmaraş and 10 other cities on February 6, 2023;

All examinations to be conducted at the end of Fall Semester (resit, single course, 44c, DUIYES) as well as the opening of Spring semester and other procedures as regards re-registration has been suspended until further notice.

As our Çengelköy Campus will be closed during this period, you can follow all administrative procedures from our Dudullu Campus until the second announcement.

You can also follow the latest announcements on our website, our social media pages and email communications.

We will bind our wounds together during this great sorrow.

Paylaş
